title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: virt-v2v bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for virt-v2v is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Windows migration failed: mkdtemp: /Windows/Temp/ESP_XXXXXX: No such file or directory [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-124791)  After migrating VM from vSphere, pnputil doesn't work properly and Driver Store appears broken [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128908)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for virt-v2v is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Windows migration failed: mkdtemp: /Windows/Temp/ESP_XXXXXX: No such file or directory [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-124791)  After migrating VM from vSphere, pnputil doesn't work properly and Driver Store appears broken [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128908)
